title: AIventure: Vibe Coding Journey
summary: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler game built on Angular and Phaser.js, powered by Gemma 4, that teaches developers about vibe coding and agentic behaviors. It demonstrates NPC interactions where the model generates code and executes autonomous thinking loops with tool calls. Gemma 4 can be served locally via Transformers.js, Ollama, or LM Studio, or routed through the Gemini API and Google Cloud.
writeup: This video presents AIventure, an open source retro dungeon crawler built on Angular and Phaser.js and powered by Gemma 4, used to demonstrate vibe coding and agentic behaviors. It shows NPC interactions in which the model generates code and runs autonomous thinking loops that issue tool calls. Gemma 4 can be served locally through Transformers.js, Ollama, or LM Studio, or routed through the Gemini API and Google Cloud, giving developers multiple deployment paths. The project ties concepts of prompt engineering, tool use, and agentic loops to a concrete game application.
